items.title: You all know about the defense, but that last dribble drive, and-1 sequence is the one I think should have Wolves fans most excited about Joan Beringer.

items.title: Joan Beringer looks great early on for the Timberwolves in Vegas. Has 6 points including a post-up, lob dunk and push shot. His defense and rebounding is affecting the game as well
items.author: Ryan Eichten
items.body_excerpt: Joan Beringer looks great early on for the Timberwolves in Vegas. Has 6 points including a post-up, lob dunk and push shot. His defense and rebounding is affecting the game as well

items.title: Wolves trying Joan Beringer in a two big lineup in the summer. Watching him work through it. Rim runs and dives and then gets back out to space. Sees his man show help and cuts (even though a roll is happening). They work it out, he goes to work in the post.

items.title: Joan Beringer: "I never played the four before in my life, so it's a big change. But I feel good about [playing the fou] and playing with Rocco, so I'm very excited."
items.author: Chris Hine
items.body_excerpt:
Joan Beringer: "I never played the four before in my life, so it's a big change. But I feel good about [playing the fou] and playing with Rocco, so I'm very excited."

Added that it requires him to switch more than he would on defense.

items.title: One note from Timberwolves summer league practice. SL coach Nathan Bubes said they're working on having Joan Beringer play some at the four alongside Rocco Zikarsky. You can put 2 + 2 together to see why they may want Beringer doing so.
